skill: Nonlinear equations in one variable and systems of equations in two variables
stem: If |5x − 5| = 145, what is the positive value of x − 1?
rationale: The expression 5x − 5 can be rewritten as 5(x − 1), so |5(x − 1)| = 145, or 5|x − 1| = 145. Dividing both sides by 5 gives |x − 1| = 29. This means x − 1 = 29 or x − 1 = −29. The positive value of x − 1 is therefore 29.
